class DLLNode:
    def __init__(self, key):
        self.key = key
        self.prev = None
        self.next = None

class DoublyLinkedList:
    def __init__(self):
        self.head = DLLNode(None)  # Dummy head
        self.tail = DLLNode(None)  # Dummy tail
        self.head.next = self.tail
        self.tail.prev = self.head
        self.size = 0

    def append(self, key):
        # Add a new node with 'key' to the end of the list (LRU within this frequency)
        new_node = DLLNode(key)
        new_node.next = self.tail
        new_node.prev = self.tail.prev
        self.tail.prev.next = new_node
        self.tail.prev = new_node
        self.size += 1
        return new_node  # Return the node reference for O(1) removal later

    def remove(self, node):
        # Remove a specific node from the list
        if node is None or self.size == 0:
            return
        node.prev.next = node.next
        node.next.prev = node.prev
        node.prev = None
        node.next = None
        self.size -= 1

    def pop_head(self):
        # Remove and return the key of the head node (actual first item, not dummy head)
        if self.is_empty():
            return None
        
        node_to_remove = self.head.next
        self.remove(node_to_remove)
        return node_to_remove.key

    def is_empty(self):
        return self.size == 0


class LFUCache:
    def __init__(self, capacity: int):
        self.capacity = capacity
        self.cache = {}  # key: value
        # key_info stores {'freq': frequency_count, 'node': DLLNode_reference}
        self.key_info = {} 
        # freq_lists maps frequency_count to a DoublyLinkedList of keys
        self.freq_lists = {}
        self.min_freq = 0 # Stores the current minimum frequency in the cache

    def _update_frequency(self, key: int):
        """Helper to increment frequency of a key and move it to the appropriate frequency list."""
        info = self.key_info[key]
        old_freq = info['freq']
        node_ref = info['node'] # Reference to the DLLNode in the old_freq list

        # Remove key's node from its old frequency list
        self.freq_lists[old_freq].remove(node_ref)

        # If the old frequency list is now empty
        if self.freq_lists[old_freq].is_empty():
            del self.freq_lists[old_freq] # Clean up the empty list
            # If the removed list was the minimum frequency list, increment min_freq
            if old_freq == self.min_freq:
                self.min_freq += 1 

        # Increment frequency and add to the new frequency list
        new_freq = old_freq + 1
        info['freq'] = new_freq
        
        if new_freq not in self.freq_lists:
            self.freq_lists[new_freq] = DoublyLinkedList()
        
        # Add key to the end of the new frequency list (LRU for this frequency)
        new_node_ref = self.freq_lists[new_freq].append(key)
        info['node'] = new_node_ref # Update the node reference in key_info

    def get(self, key: int) -> int:
        if self.capacity == 0:
            return -1

        if key not in self.cache:
            return -1
        
        # Update frequency on access
        self._update_frequency(key)
        return self.cache[key]

    def put(self, key: int, value: int) -> None:
        if self.capacity == 0:
            return

        if key in self.cache:
            # Key already exists, update value and frequency
            self.cache[key] = value
            self._update_frequency(key)
        else:
            # New key
            if len(self.cache) == self.capacity:
                # Cache is full, evict LFU item (and LRU for tie-breaking)
                
                # Get the list corresponding to the minimum frequency
                lfu_list = self.freq_lists[self.min_freq]
                # Evict the least recently used item from this list (head of DLL)
                key_to_evict = lfu_list.pop_head()

                # Remove from cache and key_info
                del self.cache[key_to_evict]
                del self.key_info[key_to_evict]

                # If the min_freq list is now empty after eviction, clean it up
                if lfu_list.is_empty():
                    del self.freq_lists[self.min_freq]

            # Add the new item
            self.cache[key] = value
            self.key_info[key] = {'freq': 1, 'node': None} 
            
            # Ensure frequency list for 1 exists
            if 1 not in self.freq_lists:
                self.freq_lists[1] = DoublyLinkedList()
            
            # Add new key to the frequency 1 list
            new_node_ref = self.freq_lists[1].append(key)
            self.key_info[key]['node'] = new_node_ref # Store node reference
            
            # A new item always starts with frequency 1, so min_freq is 1
            self.min_freq = 1
